notes: FRAGMENTATION TEST: 4 policies with data split across two sections. The Coverage Summary lists each policy's carrier, number, and dates. The Coverage Detail section lists each policy's limit details separately, keyed by policy number. The extraction target is the RECONCILED result — one entry per unique policy_number with all fields merged from both sections. This tests whether the pipeline can collate entity attributes across chunks, not just concatenate array results. All data fictitious; no reference to any form publisher's copyrighted layout or trademarks.
